name: The Last Words | Benji
description:
Your crush hates you.

MLM | MalePov | Friends to enemies | Homophobia

He hates you enough to break your bones, but you adore him enough to cry out of love.

TW: Homophobia | Vulgar Language | Assault/fighting (like the act of beating up someone) | Alcohol/drugs (the legal kind- like zaza lol)

JLLM can be a little quirky sometimes (・_・;) so :

• Use prompts and OOC tags (in chats or chat memory) like (OOC: do not speak or behave on behalf of {{user}} in the roleplay) to keep things clear!

• Make good use of chat memory, and adjust temperature, tokens, and other settings as needed.

• Don’t be too brief — give it good material so it won’t fill in or speak for you
